feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP

entry.title: Third Process SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone explain me Third party process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can anyone help me with the Order to cash process and configuration in SAP S4/HANA.

Thanking in Advance!

entry.title: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXXX- Error Message
entry.content:
Customer 2101 does not exist (please change entry in plant XXX)-Warning Message

Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXXX- Error Message

Kindly help all configurations done

entry.title: STRUST-ANAF_ETRANSPORT
entry.content:
Heloo guys,

Trying to make the connection between our sap system and the state institution ANAF (Etransport project), we followed their procedure: 

     In our sap system (SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 sp 28 / EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 sp21 with sap kernel 754 sp 200/ SSFLIB Version 1.850.40 / sapcryptolob version 8.5.50) from STRUST we activate “SSL server Standard” and from there we generate a certificate request in accordance with the procedure provided by ANAF.

     The resulting file was sent to ANAF and in response we received only the newly issued certificate, without any root or intermediate  CA's certificate.  When we try to import the received response into sap (STRUST-> select SSL Server Standard -> import certificate response) we get the following error "Issuer certificate missing in database:CN=MF Issue CA2, DC=AD, DC=FISC".

     According to sap note 508307 and many other docs, for this error, the certificate that should be imported, should be a concatenation between the response received from ANAF, the intermediate CA if needed and root CA .  But in our case we did not receive intermediate CA and root CA from ANAF. We tried to contact ANAF support to receive these certificates, but we did not receive any response.

     So in this case....the questions  are: Do you have any idea how and from where we can get the missing certificates? Any other way by which we can install the certificate received as a response without having a root CA?

Thank you

entry.title: Data append from one database to another
entry.content:
We have two development systems.

We need to add/append data from original system to target system, without removing the data already present in target system.

We are using SAP ECC 6 EHP7 on oracle 19c as the database on AIX 7.2.

Can you please let us know any steps or process for this requirement.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S033 Table Size Reduction
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

How can we reduce the size of the S033 table? What are the possible ways?

Thanks,

Snehankita

entry.title: What is the best ERP for a Startup?
entry.content: There are ERPs for large enterprises and SMBs. What about Startups? Are there ERPs specifically targeted towards startups that want to grow exponentially?

entry.title: Transaction code updated as MB**, even though they are obsolete
entry.content:
Transaction code updated as MB** for the material document posted through BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE / IDOC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How I can manage capacity in tons per hour ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to manage capacity in tons per hour. Specifically, for a machine, I want the calculation to be based on another parameter called steam, with capacity checks conducted on this parameter.

For example:

Resource 1: Capacity per hour: 8 hours, Steam capacity: 2 tons/hour.

  • Process Order 1 (PO1): Finished product with a recipe that requires 3 hours of operation on Resource 1, consuming 1 ton/hour of steam.
  • Process Order 2 (PO2): Finished product with a recipe that requires 1 hour of operation on Resource 1, consuming 3 tons/hour of steam.

In this case, we can schedule PO1 because it will consume 1 ton/hour of steam during the first hour. However, we cannot schedule PO2 since it exceeds the steam capacity of 2 tons/hour.

Can we manage this with formula ? 

Thanks a lot for your help !

Best regard,

entry.title: Combine CS15 and CS03
entry.content:
I'm checking which articles contain a particular component, in CS15. I get a lot of results, so it's tedious to check CS03 for every result. Is there a query that show all BOM's for a given component? like a combination of CS15 and CS03? 
Additionally, combining CS15 with MMBe or MB51 would be of interest.

entry.title: Re: Two-Tier ERP limitations
entry.content:
Hi,

Please find my comments below

  • SAP two-tier ERP can be highly beneficial for many industries, considering use cases that are address Acquisitions, Regional branches,Autonomous divisions, Divestitures,Incubators and joint ventures. To know more click on " What is two-tier ERP? " page on sap.com
  • If you are evaluating very specific Industry processes, you need to go through discovery phase. You can read more - S/4HANA Cloud Digital Discovery Assessment. Please register here. 
  • Again, each organization must carefully assess their unique needs, regulatory environment, business complexity, and available resources before deciding if a two-tier ERP approach makes sense. You may engage with an SAP account executive to evaluate different options, including cost benefits.
  • For detailed documentation, users can explore the given path in SAP for Me to understand the full range of SAP-delivered two-tier ERP capabilities  SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and visit accelerators > Implementation> Two-Tier ERP_End-to-End Business Processes for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 
  • You can also reach out two-tier ERP community for more specific clarifications

Regards, Shivakumar HS

entry.title: Pre-edited approval table.
entry.content: Would you like to know if there is a table that stores the documents with record of release and approval of pre-edited documents (FBV0)?

entry.title: T-code : FD32 Run time error for change credit account.
entry.content: I encountered an issue when attempting to change the credit account using transaction code FD32. The process took an unusually long time to save, and ultimately resulted in a runtime error.I attempted to implement note 99937 - Credit Management: Runtime error TIME_OUT, but unfortunately, the issue continues to persist. Can you suggest any alternative methods for recommending solutions?

entry.title: Hit error when applying patch 19.24.0.0.240716 - 202408 on RedHat 8
Standard Process for Pre-Payments in POs
entry.content:
Would like to request for documentation on the Standard process of SAP for PO Pre-Payments.


Background:


Budget it currently maintained (FM and PS) on a yearly basis which poses issues when Business attempts to create a Subscription/Multi-year PO with the Pre-Payment scheme (since the whole cost is front loaded to the first year)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: wbs system status blocking recording of labor hours
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

 

Is it possible to block recording of labor hours (transaction CO11N), arising from production order operations, through the user status of a WBS element?

What status business operation would this configuration be in?

Thanks in advance,

Elaine

entry.title: Additional Custom tab in equipment master
entry.content:
Hi , 

We need the Additional Tab in equipment master in the current client production system.

 we have tried to create it in sand box system, we are not able to create the tab as there is limitation from SAP.

Please let us know, how to make the provision for creation/add 1 more tab in equipment master.

entry.title: Block PO creation if not associated to PR
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I Have a business requirement to block the creation of PO if it's not associated to PR for the document type NB, and for another document type ZNB I can create the PO with no reference to PR 

I tried to use the field selection (ZBNF) and made the field PR mandatory but it's not working *SAP", 

could you please help me, I found some forms talking abour making that mandatory in the user parameter but I did not understand how to that and also my requirement is to make PR manadatory for a certrain docuent type NB, the other doc type ZNB I can create PO with no PR 

 

Thank you so much in advance

entry.title: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.
entry.content: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.

entry.title: Group condition discount
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus please i have a scenario where i have lets say three line items of 3 different materials with the same material pricing group.

For two of them i have set up a discount  scale in vk11 I set up a discount condition type (calculation type - quantity and quantity scale based), i set it as header condition, item condition, group condition and tried to assign the group condition routine 1, 2 and 3 as well. Now i want the system to set the discount amount (according to scales) according to the cumulative amount of all three items (not just the two that have the condition type present in the line items). The cumulation works for the two that have the discount condition type but the third is left out can you please help?
